system_pressure_at_trigger.description: system pressure when load/unload command is triggered
system_pressure_at_trigger.evidence: Maintains net pressure between programmable limits, automatically loads and unloads compressor

loading_pressure.description: programmed pressure level at which compressor loads
loading_pressure.evidence: When net pressure decreases to loading pressure, solenoid valve energized

pressure_regulation_range.description: pressure difference between loading and unloading setpoints
pressure_regulation_range.evidence: Pressure variations: 0.3 to 1 bar range (depends on permitted number of load/unload cycles per time unit)

solenoid_valve_y1_state.description: state of loading solenoid valve y1 - energized for loading, de-energized for unloading
solenoid_valve_y1_state.evidence: Solenoid valve (Y1) is de-energized for unloading, energized for loading

inlet_valve_position.description: position of inlet valve during load/unload cycle
inlet_valve_position.evidence: Loading plunger (LP) moves upwards → inlet valve (IV) closes air inlet opening

unloading_valve_position.description: position of unloading valve during cycle
unloading_valve_position.evidence: Unloading valve (UV) opened by receiver pressure → pressure from air receiver (AR) released towards unloader (UA)

compressor_load_state.description: final operating state after regulation cycle completion
compressor_load_state.evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

air_output_percentage.description: compressor air output percentage after regulation event
air_output_percentage.evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed (100%), compressor runs loaded

control_air_pressure.description: pressure in control air system fed from air receiver to loading plunger and unloading valve
control_air_pressure.evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver AR via solenoid valve Y1 to loading plunger LP and unloading valve UV

automatic_operation_active.description: indicates if regulator is in automatic operation mode during event
automatic_operation_active.evidence: Automatic operation LED indicates regulator automatically controlling compressor: loaded, unloaded, stopped and restarted

minimum_stop_time.description: programmable minimum time compressor remains stopped
minimum_stop_time.evidence: Programmable settings include minimum stop time

cycle_duration.description: total time from start of load/unload trigger to completion
cycle_duration.evidence: Load/unload regulation accepts larger variations in pressure between two limit values

air_receiver_pressure.description: pressure in air receiver tank during regulation event
air_receiver_pressure.evidence: Control pressure fed from air receiver (AR) via solenoid valve (Y1)

system_pressure_loading_point.description: pressure level at which compressor automatically loads to resume air production
system_pressure_loading_point.evidence: Loading pressure when pressure decreases to loading pressure

compressor_air_output_state.description: operating state indicating whether compressor is producing compressed air
compressor_air_output_state.evidence: Air output stopped 0%, compressor runs unloaded / Air output resumed 100%, compressor runs loaded

compressor_element_outlet_temperature.description: temperature measured at compressor element outlet by sensor tt11
compressor_element_outlet_temperature.evidence: Approx. 60 degrees celsius above cooling air temperature sensor TT11

oil_separator_pressure_difference.description: pressure difference across oil separator measured by pdt1
oil_separator_pressure_difference.evidence: Pressure difference over oil separator reading below 1 bar

automatic_operation_led_state.description: led indicator showing regulator is automatically controlling load/unload cycles
automatic_operation_led_state.evidence: Automatic operation LED lights up indicates regulator automatically controlling compressor loaded, unloaded, stopped

display_status_message.description: text message displayed showing current compressor operating state
display_status_message.evidence: Display message change From <<Auto unloaded>> to <<Auto loaded>>

regulation_pressure_band.description: pressure difference between loading and unloading pressure limits for load/unload regulation
regulation_pressure_band.evidence: Load/Unload Regulation accepts larger variations in pressure between two limit values, pressure variations 0.3 to 1 bar range

system_pressure.description: current air outlet pressure measured by pt20
system_pressure.evidence: Air outlet pressure reading modulates between programmed unloading and loading pressures

air_flow_output.description: compressed air flow rate output from compressor
air_flow_output.evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Air output resumed (100%).

loading_duration.description: time duration compressor operates in loaded state producing compressed air
loading_duration.evidence: Compressor runs loaded. Air output resumed (100%).

power_consumption_unloaded.description: power consumption percentage during unloaded operation
power_consumption_unloaded.evidence: Only 15-30% of full load power with off-loaded compressor (zero flow)

unloading_duration.description: time duration compressor operates in unloaded state with zero air output
unloading_duration.evidence: Air output stopped (0%), compressor runs unloaded. Minimum stop time programmable.

display_message_state.description: display message indicating current compressor operating mode
display_message_state.evidence: Display message change: From <<Auto unloaded>> to <<Auto loaded>>.
